question_sentence: Which state became part of the Schengen Zone of border-free European travel?
Netflix’s reboot of which retro TV classic attracted 6.4 million viewers in its first four days on the platform?
At which course is the 154th Open Championship – men’s golf’s final major of the season – being played this week?
What did astronomers discover in interstellar space for the first time?
Donald Trump made – and then rapidly walked back – a threat to install what in the Strait of Hormuz?
Who scored the winning goal in Argentina’s men’s World Cup football victory over England?
The US is experiencing an outbreak of intestinal illness linked to which food-transmitted parasite?
Mick Jagger revealed that he passed up the opportunity to meet which music legend?
According to a new poll, how many Britons were able to identify incoming prime minister Andy Burnham from a photo?
What did Sotheby’s sell for just over $50 million (£37 million) at an auction?
What did the US House vote to make permanent this week?
evidence: The House voted on Tuesday to make Daylight Saving Time permanent nationwide, but it now faces an uncertain path in the Senate.

question_sentence: Health officials say that a multi-state outbreak of diarrhea caused by a parasite may have been spread by which type of food?
evidence: Officials said their investigation suggests that lettuce or salad greens may be the culprit of the cyclospora outbreak, but other foods can’t be ruled out.

question_sentence: The 2026 men's World Cup introduced a new generation of Americans to The Beautiful Game. How long will we have to wait until the next one?
evidence: You’ll need a little patience. The next World Cup won’t kick off until 2030, when Spain, Portugal and Morocco take the stage as co-hosts.

question_sentence: Which animal made headlines this week for launching a man into the air at Yellowstone National Park?
evidence: A grandfather is recovering from surgery after a bison attack at Yellowstone sent him flying in a now-viral video.

question_sentence: Republican Sen. Mitch McConnell of Kentucky announced recently that his prolonged hospital stay was due to which of the following?
evidence: McConnell, who is 84, said he had a fall in June that landed him in the hospital, adding that his doctors said he didn’t break any bones or suffer a concussion.

question_sentence: Which family member of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham was appointed to finish out his term in the Senate?
evidence: South Carolina's governor announced the appointment of Sen. Lindsey Graham's sister, Darline Graham, to finish the longtime Republican lawmaker's term in Congress after he died suddenly over the weekend from an aortic dissection.

question_sentence: Severe flooding resulted in dozens of water rescues this week in which state?
evidence: Dozens of people in southern Texas were recently pulled from floodwaters after rapid downpours.

question_sentence: What unusual color did many people report seeing in the sky across New York City this week?
evidence: Canadian wildfire smoke is spilling across the border into the US, turning skies orange and exposing millions across the Northeast and Midwest to unhealthy air.

question_sentence: An Argentine court has ruled that two goldfish on display in a restaurant window were what?
evidence: The pair of small fish, named Fede and Magui, were recognized in court as sentient beings with rights under the law.

question_sentence: Actor Sam Neill died this week at age 78. He was perhaps best known for the role of Dr. Alan Grant in which movie?
evidence: Neill starred as Dr. Grant, a paleontologist, in Steven Spielberg’s “Jurassic Park.”
